title: Research a Recipe Safely
drDigitalIntro:
Time to put everything together!
• Use the browser to search for a recipe you'd like to cook.
• Check a few websites and avoid suspicious ads or fake download buttons.
• Bookmark your favorite recipe and add it to your Reading List.
drDigitalSuccess: You navigated the internet safely and found what you needed!
drDigitalHint: Look for the lock icon, avoid weird popups, and bookmark what you like.
